title: T-70 (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Black_One_BF2.png|thumb|right|300px|[[Poe Dameron]]'s T-70 X-wing starfighter ''[[Black One]]'']]
T-70 may refer to:
*the [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends#Behind_the_scenes|X-34 landspeeder]] as identified in the Legends novel ''Children of the Jedi''
*the [[T-70 X-wing starfighter]]
*the [[T-70 X-wing Expansion Pack]]
